uttar_pradesh_spiritual_circuit.title: Uttar Pradesh Spiritual Circuit
key_inclusions: VIP Riverfront seating at the Dashashwamedh Ghat evening Aarti.
Sankat Mochan, Kashi Vishwanath & Annapurna Golden Temple Special Entrance.
Triveni Sangam holy dip boat ride with local pandit assistance.
Spiritual walk through Ram Janmabhoomi Complex, Ayodhya.

full_itinerary.day1: Arrive in Varanasi. Traditional welcome. Scenic sunset cruise & VIP seating at evening Ganga Aarti. Night stay in luxury riverview suites.
full_itinerary.day2: Sunrise boat excursion. Special early morning Darshan at Kashi Vishwanath Temple. Afternoon drive to Prayagraj (seek blessings at Triveni Sangam), overnight in Ayodhya.
full_itinerary.day3: Majestic tour of Ayodhya (Ram Mandir VIP Darshan, Hanuman Garhi, Sarayu River historical walk). Proceed for late evening flight/drive to Bodhgaya.
full_itinerary.day4: Deep morning meditation at Mahabodhi Stupa & meditation under the sacred Bodhi Tree. Farewell and smooth return transfer to Varanasi / Varanasi Airport.

royal_rajasthan_heritage.title: Royal Rajasthan Heritage
key_inclusions: Gala Dinner at a restored medieval Jaipur fort overlooking the lighted city.
Private jeep safari with sunset mocktails over Jaisalmer golden sand dunes.
Lake Pichola private boat cruise in Udaipur with Palace Island tour.
Curated tour of Mehrangarh Castle under regional expert guides.

full_itinerary.day1: Pink City arrival (Jaipur). Shell necklace greeting. Explore local traditional block print workshops, Hawa Mahal capture, and welcome palace dinner.
full_itinerary.day2: Morning Amber Fort ascend via private open-jeep. Afternoon drive to Blue City (Jodhpur). Traditional Rajasthani Thali experience.
full_itinerary.day3: Wander historical Mehrangarh Fort & Jaswant Thada mausoleum. Head west into Jaisalmer golden desert. Evening camel trek and luxury desert glamping with live Sufi performance.
full_itinerary.day4: Guided exploration of Havelis inside Jaisalmer Golden Living Fort. Drive to the romantic lake-city of Udaipur.
full_itinerary.day5: Royal lake Udaipur excursions. City Palace museum private preview, Saheliyon-ki-Bari gardens, and elegant sunset catamaran cruise on Lake Pichola.
full_itinerary.day6: Authentic breakfast. Transfer to Udaipur / Jodhpur Airport with memorable mementos.

majestic_char_dham_yatra.title: Majestic Char Dham Yatra
key_inclusions: Complete registration, VIP pass & Queue-bypass at all four Himalayan temples.
Full mountain paramedic medical-pax support shell throughout the journey.
Comfortable pre-booked luxury premium cottages and dharamshalas.
Helicopter charter options from Dehradun or Phata direct to Temple helipads.

full_itinerary.day1: Haridwar to scenic mountain hamlet Barkot. Evening dynamic Ganga briefing.
full_itinerary.day2: Trek or pony ride up to Yamunotri Holy Shrine. Holy bath in Surya Kund. Return to Barkot.
full_itinerary.day3: Scenic mountain ridge drive to Uttar-Kashi along holy Bhagirathi River banks.
full_itinerary.day4: Day-trip up into Gangotri Temple. Holy dip in Ganga icy-pure stream, temple Puja, and back to Uttarkashi.
full_itinerary.day5: Long gorgeous drive to Guptkashi, surrounded by snow-draped Himalayan slopes.
full_itinerary.day6: Helicopter ride or pristine trek up to Kedarnath Temple. Unforgettable evening Shiva Aarti.
full_itinerary.day7: Watch sunrise over Kedarnath Dome. Descend back safely to Guptkashi stay.
full_itinerary.day8: Drive to Badrinath Temple via beautiful Joshimath and high-altitude valleys.
full_itinerary.day9: Hot springs dip, Badrinath Temple Puja. Evening trip to the ancient border village Mana.
full_itinerary.day10: Return drive down to the peaceful confluence towns of Rudraprayag / Srinagar.
full_itinerary.day11: Drive to spiritual capital Rishikesh. Yoga experience, Laxman Jhula bridge, & farewell dinner.
full_itinerary.day12: Guided transfer to Dehradun Airport or Haridwar station.

golden_triangle_spiritual_gateway.title: Golden Triangle Spiritual Gateway
key_inclusions: Express skip-the-queue passes to historical monuments.
Evening Prem Mandir musical and lights presentation in Vrindavan.
Special morning guided walk of Banke Bihari and ISKCON temples.
Bespoke culinary experience with traditional sweets (Agra Petha & Mathura Peda).

full_itinerary.day1: Delhi arrival. Explore majestic architectural spots (Birla Mandir, Akshardham, dynamic India Gate twilight walk). Stay in high-class business-boutique hotel.
full_itinerary.day2: Delhi to historical city Agra. Guided private afternoon capture of World Wonder Taj Mahal, and Agra Fort. Heritage evening dinner.
full_itinerary.day3: Depart Agra to Mathura (Krishna Birthplace temple visit). Proceed to holy town Vrindavan. Attend the majestic evening lights display at the stunning Prem Mandir.
full_itinerary.day4: Complete spiritual walkthrough inside Vrindavan's narrow alleys, Nidhivan (sacred forest), and historic Banke Bihari temple. Return to Delhi.
full_itinerary.day5: Leisure breakfast, souvenirs gifting, and seamless transfers to Delhi Airport / New Delhi Railway Station.
